svg.title: CTV Vault — Nested Commitments
svg.desc: CTV builds transaction chains inside-out: withdrawal first (innermost), trigger second, vault address third (outermost). The ephemeral key is destroyed. Execution follows the locked path from outside in. Recovery bypasses the entire structure.

g.aria-label: Ephemeral signing key — destroyed after backwards construction
Recovery — cold sweep that bypasses the entire locked commitment chain
